subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter arrived. A brief reply will be written, as there is no time. Do not be saddened by the occurrences in Kirmanshah.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق نامه رسید مختصر جواب مرقوم میشود فرصت نیست از حوادث کرمانشاه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @consolation and comfort, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
